---
title: "News Archive"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
jupyter: python3
---

Most recent news about stablecoins appearing first.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
import pandas as pd
import os
import html
from IPython.display import display, Markdown

archive_path = 'data/news_archive.csv'

if os.path.exists(archive_path):
    df = pd.read_csv(archive_path)
    # Ensure datetime
    df['published_dt'] = pd.to_datetime(df['published_dt'])
    
    # Sort just in case
    df = df.sort_values(by='published_dt', ascending=False)
    
    # Generate Markdown table or list
    for _, row in df.iterrows():
        # Security: Sanitize untrusted data to prevent Markdown injection, XSS, and Quarto shortcode injection
        safe_title = html.escape(str(row['title'])).replace('[', '&#91;').replace(']', '&#93;').replace('{', '&#123;').replace('}', '&#125;')
        safe_link = str(row['link']) if str(row['link']).startswith(('http://', 'https://')) else '#'
        safe_link = safe_link.replace('{', '%7B').replace('}', '%7D')
        safe_link = safe_link.replace(' ', '%20').replace('(', '%28').replace(')', '%29').replace('"', '%22')
        safe_published = html.escape(str(row['published'])).replace('[', '&#91;').replace(']', '&#93;').replace('{', '&#123;').replace('}', '&#125;')

        display(Markdown(f"### [{safe_title}]({safe_link})"))
        display(Markdown(f"_{safe_published}_"))
        display(Markdown("---"))
else:
    display(Markdown("No news archived yet."))
```
